---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Internships

1.  3EN Defense and Aerospace Systems Inc. , Production Planning Intern , 01/07/2025 - 01/08/2025

# Projects

Facility Layout (During my internship)

Database Management Systems (Academic Project)

Demand Allocation (Graduation Project)

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, SQL, MATLAB

# Hobbies

Basketball, Marbling Art

[Click here to see my resume](ece_CV.pdf)
